title: Pascal Georges
text: Home * People * Pascal Georges Pascal Georges a French software developer who worked on Shane's Chess Information Database , SCID from December 2006 to January 2010. Amongst other things, he added UCI , FICS and Novag Citrine support, docking modes, training features, and ported SCID to the Pocket PC [1] .
